word: G4939 - σύντροφος - sýntrophos - soon'-trof-os - Brought up with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Brought up with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and G5162 (in a passive sense); a fellow nursling, that is, comrade: - brought up with.
